mapper.select:
select from providers
and ( code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or provider_type like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by id desc

select count(1) from providers where code = #{code}
and id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: insert into providers(code, name, provider_type, status) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{providerType}, #{status})
